mapper.select: SELECT CER_NUM, CLA_NUM, CER_NAME, CER_SAVE_NAME, CER_SAVE_PATH, CER_REGDATE FROM CertifiCate WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CertifiCate ( CER_NUM, CLA_NUM, CER_NAME, CER_SAVE_NAME, CER_SAVE_PATH, CER_REGDATE ) VALUES ( #{cerNum}, #{claNum}, #{cerName}, #{cerSaveName}, #{cerSavePath}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CertifiCate SET CER_NAME = #{cerName}, CER_SAVE_NAME = #{cerSaveName}, CER_SAVE_PATH = #{cerSavePath}, CER_REGDATE = SYSDATE WHERE CER_NUM = #{cerNum}
